final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, nine panels arranged in rows and columns, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: Zhao Ling'er, young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses
Scene/backdrop: torn hole in white paper as consistent framing device across all panels
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 9 distinct panels with specific expressions and outfits - top-left winking adjusting glasses green sweater, top-center smirking lowering dark sunglasses red leather jacket, top-right thinking finger on chin yellow hoodie, middle-left big smile arms resting on edge black and white striped shirt, middle-center smiling thumbs up orange button-up shirt, middle-right neutral drinking boba tea blue sweater, bottom-left happy waving purple sweater vest over white shirt, bottom-center laughing with eyes closed arms crossed pink cardigan, bottom-right silly poking cheeks teal sweater
Avoid:
